allow: PowerShell(if \(-not $?\) { "no gh releases or repo not found" })

PowerShell(cd "c:\\Users\\djsco\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\smooth-camera"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $zip = Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "smooth-camera.zip"; if \(Test-Path $zip\) { Remove-Item $zip -Force }; $fs = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::Open\($zip, 'Create'\); [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile\($fs, \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "module.json"\), "module.json"\) | Out-Null; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFileExtensions]::CreateEntryFromFile\($fs, \(Join-Path \(Get-Location\) "scripts\\main.bundle.js"\), "scripts/main.bundle.js"\) | Out-Null; $fs.Dispose\(\); "--- zip contents ---"; [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\($zip\).Entries | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })

PowerShell($u = "https://github.com/nscarpinatodev/smooth_camera/releases/latest/download/module.json"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; \($r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json\) | Select-Object id, version, manifest, download | Format-List } catch { "ERROR: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($u = "https://github.com/nscarpinatodev/smooth_camera/releases/latest/download/module.json"; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing; $json = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($r.Content\) | ConvertFrom-Json; $json | Select-Object id, version, @{n='compat';e={"$\($_.compatibility.minimum\) - $\($_.compatibility.verified\)"}}, manifest, download | Format-List; "--- zip asset reachable? ---"; \(Invoke-WebRequest "https://github.com/nscarpinatodev/smooth_camera/releases/download/v1.0.0/smooth-camera.zip" -Method Head -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing\).StatusCode)
